import json
with open\('4_Fine_Tuning_Final.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Number of cells: {len\(nb[\\"cells\\"]\)}'\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    ct = cell['cell_type']
    src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)[:120]
    print\(f'Cell {i} [{ct}]: {src[:120]}'\)
")

import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('4_Fine_Tuning_Final.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Number of cells: {len\(nb[\\"cells\\"]\)}'\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    ct = cell['cell_type']
    src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)[:150].replace\('\\n',' '\)
    print\(f'Cell {i} [{ct}]: {src}'\)
")
